allow: PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}:/app" -v afb_m2:/root/.m2 -w /app maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21 mvn -B -q -DskipTests compile)

PowerShell("--- docker containers using 5432 ---"; docker ps --format "{{.Names}}  {{.Ports}}" | Select-String "5432"; "--- host listeners on 5432 ---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5432 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) $\($p.ProcessName\)" } | Select-Object -Unique)

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8085/api/departments" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if \($ok\) { "APP READY"; $r.Content } else { "APP NOT READY - last 30 log lines:"; docker logs appointment-scheduler-api-app-1 --tail 30 2>&1 })
